speaker: CAPULET
text: So many guests invite as here are writ.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Sirrah, go hire me twenty cunning cooks.

speaker: SERVINGMAN
text: You shall have none ill, sir, for I’ll try if

speaker: SERVINGMAN
text: they can lick their fingers.

speaker: CAPULET
text: How canst thou try them so?

speaker: SERVINGMAN
text: Marry, sir, ’tis an ill cook that cannot lick

speaker: SERVINGMAN
text: his own fingers. Therefore he that cannot lick his

speaker: SERVINGMAN
text: fingers goes not with me.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Go, begone.

speaker: CAPULET
text: We shall be much unfurnished for this time.—

speaker: CAPULET
text: What, is my daughter gone to Friar Lawrence?

speaker: NURSE
text: Ay, forsooth.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Well, he may chance to do some good on her.

speaker: CAPULET
text: A peevish self-willed harlotry it is.

speaker: NURSE
text: See where she comes from shrift with merry look.

speaker: CAPULET
text: How now, my headstrong, where have you been gadding?

speaker: JULIET
text: Where I have learned me to repent the sin

speaker: JULIET
text: Of disobedient opposition

speaker: JULIET
text: To you and your behests, and am enjoined

speaker: JULIET
text: By holy Lawrence to fall prostrate here

speaker: JULIET
text: To beg your pardon. Pardon, I beseech you.

speaker: JULIET
text: Henceforward I am ever ruled by you.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Send for the County. Go tell him of this.

speaker: CAPULET
text: I’ll have this knot knit up tomorrow morning.

speaker: JULIET
text: I met the youthful lord at Lawrence’ cell

speaker: JULIET
text: And gave him what becomèd love I might,

speaker: JULIET
text: Not stepping o’er the bounds of modesty.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Why, I am glad on ’t. This is well. Stand up.

speaker: CAPULET
text: This is as ’t should be.—Let me see the County.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Ay, marry, go, I say, and fetch him hither.—

speaker: CAPULET
text: Now, afore God, this reverend holy friar,

speaker: CAPULET
text: All our whole city is much bound to him.

speaker: JULIET
text: Nurse, will you go with me into my closet

speaker: JULIET
text: To help me sort such needful ornaments

speaker: JULIET
text: As you think fit to furnish me tomorrow?

speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: No, not till Thursday. There is time enough.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Go, nurse. Go with her. We’ll to church tomorrow.

speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: We shall be short in our provision.

speaker:
LADY
               
              CAPULET
text: ’Tis now near night.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Tush, I will stir about,

speaker: CAPULET
text: And all things shall be well, I warrant thee, wife.

speaker: CAPULET
text: Go thou to Juliet. Help to deck up her.

speaker: CAPULET
text: I’ll not to bed tonight. Let me alone.

speaker: CAPULET
text: I’ll play the housewife for this once.—What ho!—

speaker: CAPULET
text: They are all forth. Well, I will walk myself

speaker: CAPULET
text: To County Paris, to prepare up him

speaker: CAPULET
text: Against tomorrow. My heart is wondrous light

speaker: CAPULET
text: Since this same wayward girl is so reclaimed.
